violations.text: Chicken wings were observed cooling in the walk-in refrigerator in covered plastic containers greater than four inches deep at 70 degrees Fahrenheit. Proper cooling methods were reviewed at the time of inspection. Chicken wings were rearranged for rapid cooling at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2026
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Proper storage of in-use utensils was reviewed at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2026

The pre-flush spray hose at the dish machine is hanging below the flood rim. Pre-flush sprayer or spring is to be adjusted to prevent the pre-flush nozzle from hanging below the flood rim of the sink. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2026

The sink used for food preparation is lacking a proper air gap. The prep sink drainpipe is to be adjusted as to maintain the end of the drainpipe above the flood rim of the floor drain. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2026

The floor in areas of the facility behind shelving and equipment were observed to have droppings and debris. Physical facilities are to be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean and to aid in the current pest control program. Cleaning of the areas observed began at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2026

Working containers of dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2024

The door to the outside, located in the side kitchen area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2024

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of bar mat) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2024
The receptacles in the restrooms are lacking covers. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 04/12/2024

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in the walk-in and storage areas. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2024
